title: Erigeron robustior
taxonomy: Erigeron robustior is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It belongs to the genus Erigeron, which is a group of daisy-like plants. The species is native to the mountainous regions of North America. As a member of the family Asteraceae, Erigeron robustior is closely related to other flowering plants such as sunflowers and daisies. The classification of Erigeron robustior is further refined to the order Asterales, class Magnoliopsida, and division Magnoliophyta.
